creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Also, please note svn status:
M       security/gnupg/Makefile
M       security/gnupg/distinfo
A       security/gnupg/files/patch-dirmngr__dns-stuff.c
D       security/gnupg/files/patch-doc-Makefile.in
M       security/gnupg/pkg-plist

Patch patch-doc-Makefile.in has been merged upstream, and I reported patch-dirmngr__dns-stuff.c to the gnupg-devel mailing list (will show up in the archives shortly).
